sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_b160cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"Virtual Agent Plugin Status","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var vaResult = checkPlugin("com.glide.cs.chatbot", "com.glide.cs.chatbot");
    var pluginActive = vaResult.found;
    // Functional fallback: sys_cs_topic table existing = VA is installed
    if (!pluginActive) {
        var testGr = new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");
        testGr.setLimit(1);
        testGr.query();
        pluginActive = testGr.isValid();
    }
    var prop = gs.getProperty("glide.cs.enabled", "false");
    var actualValue = "Plugin active: " + pluginActive + " | glide.cs.enabled: " + prop;
    if (pluginActive && prop === "true") {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent plugin is active and glide.cs.enabled=true. Now Assist conversational AI prerequisites are satisfied." };
    } else if (pluginActive) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent plugin is active but glide.cs.enabled is not set to true. Now Assist conversational AI will not function until this property is enabled." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent plugin (com.glide.cs.chatbot) is not active. Now Assist conversational AI cannot function without the base VA plugin." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Virtual Agent plugin is the core prerequisite for all Now Assist conversational AI capabilities. Without it no VA or conversational AI features function.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Virtual Agent plugin (com.glide.cs.chatbot) via sys_plugins_list.do. Set glide.cs.enabled=true in sys_properties. Both are required for Now Assist conversational AI.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"Now Assist VA Integration","order":"20","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_nowassist_va", "sn_nowassist_va");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist VA Integration (" + "sn_nowassist_va" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist VA integration is installed. Generative AI responses and enhanced intent matching are available in VA conversations."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist VA Integration (sn_nowassist_va) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist VA integration (sn_nowassist_va) not found. Generative AI responses and enhanced intent matching are unavailable in VA conversations."
        };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist Virtual Agent integration enables AI-powered intent matching and generative response capabilities within VA conversations.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist VA plugin (sn_nowassist_va) via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure Now Assist integration in VA Admin Console. Now Assist enhances VA with generative AI and improved intent matching.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"Published VA Topic Count","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('published', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active VA topics';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published VA topics. Now Assist VA has broad topic coverage for meaningful AI-assisted self-service.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics (target: 50+). Now Assist VA self-service coverage will be limited — publish additional topics for key use cases.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics. Insufficient topic coverage for meaningful Now Assist VA self-service — a minimum foundation of topics is required before AI enhancement adds value.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Published VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist can assist with. More topics means broader AI self-service coverage.","remediation_guidance":"Publish VA topics for top self-service categories. Target: 50+ published topics before Now Assist VA enablement. Focus on high-volume request types first.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"NLU Model Training Status","order":"40","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_nlu_model");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_nlu_model not found", finding: "NLU Model table (sys_nlu_model) is not available. Verify the Virtual Agent plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sys_nlu_model");
    gaTotal.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active NLU models found", finding: "No active NLU models found. NLU training status cannot be assessed — configure NLU models for VA topic intent recognition." };
    }
    var gaTrained = new GlideAggregate("sys_nlu_model");
    gaTrained.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTrained.addQuery("state", "trained");
    gaTrained.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTrained.query();
    var trained = gaTrained.next() ? parseInt(gaTrained.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = Math.round((trained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = trained + " of " + total + " active NLU models trained (" + pct + "%)";
    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active NLU models are trained. Now Assist intent recognition has accurate model coverage." };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: (total - trained) + " of " + total + " NLU models are untrained (" + pct + "% trained, target: 80%+). Now Assist intent matching accuracy will be reduced for topics without trained models." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of NLU models are trained. Now Assist intent recognition requires trained NLU models — untrained models produce poor AI matching accuracy." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Trained NLU models power Now Assist intent recognition. Untrained or low-accuracy models produce poor intent matching and degrade conversational AI quality.","remediation_guidance":"Train NLU models with representative utterances for each topic. Target: 80%+ of active models trained with accuracy above 85%. Retrain after adding new topics or utterances.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Channel Configuration","order":"50","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_channel");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=3?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active VA channels",finding:n<3?"Only "+n+" VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI should be deployed across multiple channels for maximum self-service reach.":n+" VA channels -- Now Assist reaches employees across "+n+" deployment channels."};})()","ai_justification":"VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Each additional channel extends AI self-service reach.","remediation_guidance":"Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Conversation Volume and Containment","order":"60","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No VA conversations in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No VA conversations found in the last 90 days. Conversation volume and containment cannot be assessed — drive VA adoption before enabling Now Assist.'
        };
    }

    var gaContained = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaContained.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaContained.addQuery('state', 'complete');
    gaContained.addQuery('agent_transfer_at', '');
    gaContained.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaContained.query();
    var contained = gaContained.next() ? parseInt(gaContained.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((contained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + ' conversations (last 90 days) | ' + pct + '% contained without agent transfer';

    if (total >= 1000 && pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' conversations with ' + pct + '% containment rate (last 90 days). Now Assist VA has a solid self-service foundation to build on.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 200 || pct >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' conversations with ' + pct + '% containment (last 90 days). Targets: 1,000+ conversations, 40%+ containment. Drive VA adoption and improve topic fulfillment before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low VA usage (' + total + ' conversations, ' + pct + '% containment in last 90 days). Now Assist VA AI improvements require an established VA user base and conversation history to be effective.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"VA conversation volume and containment rate measure self-service effectiveness. Now Assist AI improves with more conversation data.","remediation_guidance":"Drive VA adoption through promotion and channel expansion. Track metrics via VA Analytics dashboard. Target: 1,000+ conversations and 60%+ containment rate for optimal Now Assist VA impact.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Topic Intent Coverage","order":"70","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaPublished = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaPublished.addQuery('active', true);
    gaPublished.addQuery('published', true);
    gaPublished.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPublished.query();
    var published = gaPublished.next() ? parseInt(gaPublished.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active VA topics found',
            finding: 'No active VA topics found. Topic intent coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var unpublished = total - published;
    var pct = Math.round((published / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = published + ' published | ' + unpublished + ' unpublished | ' + pct + '% of active topics published';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active VA topics are published. Now Assist VA intent coverage is comprehensive — most authored topics are available to users.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active topics are published (' + unpublished + ' unpublished). Now Assist VA intent gaps exist for topics in development — publish high-priority topics to improve AI coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active topics are published (' + unpublished + ' unpublished). More than half of authored VA topics are unavailable to users — Now Assist VA intent coverage has significant gaps.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Intent coverage measures how well VA topics cover actual employee inquiry types. Now Assist AI requires comprehensive intent coverage to reduce agent escalation.","remediation_guidance":"Review unpublished active topics and publish those that are complete and tested. Target: 80%+ of active topics published. Unpublished topics represent intent gaps that Now Assist VA cannot cover.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Analytics Configuration","order":"80","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
    gr.addQuery('name', 'com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    var exists = gr.next();
    var value = exists ? gr.getValue('value') : null;
    var enabled = value === 'true';

    var actualValue = 'VA analytics enabled: ' + enabled;

    if (enabled) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA analytics is enabled. Now Assist VA self-service impact is being measured — deflection rate, containment, and top topics are tracked.'
        };
    } else if (!exists) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'VA analytics property not set (com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled)',
            finding: 'VA analytics property has not been configured. Enable VA analytics to measure Now Assist self-service impact and identify AI improvement opportunities.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA analytics is explicitly disabled. Enable VA analytics to measure Now Assist self-service impact and identify AI improvement opportunities.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"VA analytics provide the performance data Now Assist uses to identify improvement opportunities and measure AI self-service impact.","remediation_guidance":"Set com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled=true in sys_properties. Review VA dashboards weekly. Track deflection rate, containment, and top topics. Now Assist impact is measured through VA analytics.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Topic Fulfillment Rate","order":"90","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', 'complete,agent_requested,abandoned');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No completed VA conversations in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No completed VA conversations found in the last 90 days. Topic fulfillment rate cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCompleted = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaCompleted.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCompleted.addQuery('state', 'complete');
    gaCompleted.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCompleted.query();
    var completed = gaCompleted.next() ? parseInt(gaCompleted.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% VA conversations fulfilled without agent transfer (last 90 days, ' + completed + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of VA conversations completed without agent transfer (last 90 days). Now Assist VA has a strong self-service foundation to enhance.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 30) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA conversations are fulfilled without agent transfer (last 90 days, target: 60%+). Now Assist AI self-service impact is limited when topic fulfillment is low.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA conversations are fulfilled (last 90 days). Very low fulfillment rate indicates broken topic flows or catalog integrations — fix these before enabling Now Assist VA.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Topic fulfillment rate measures whether VA topics successfully complete their designed outcome. Low fulfillment degrades Now Assist self-service effectiveness.","remediation_guidance":"Review topic fulfillment rates in VA analytics. Fix broken catalog integrations and workflow connections. Now Assist AI is only as effective as the topics it enhances. Target: 60%+ fulfillment rate.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Knowledge Integration","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check 1: Auto-resolution configuration (OOB VA-KB deflection mechanism on modern instances)
    var gaAutoRes = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_auto_resolution_configuration');
    gaAutoRes.addQuery('active', true);
    gaAutoRes.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaAutoRes.query();
    var activeAutoRes = gaAutoRes.next() ? parseInt(gaAutoRes.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    // Check 2: Published KB articles (content behind the deflection)
    var gaKB = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaKB.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaKB.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaKB.query();
    var articles = gaKB.next() ? parseInt(gaKB.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = 'Auto-resolution configs active: ' + activeAutoRes + ' | Published KB articles: ' + articles;

    if (activeAutoRes >= 1 && articles >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is active with ' + articles + ' published KB articles. Now Assist VA can surface AI-recommended KB articles for self-service deflection.'
        };
    } else if (activeAutoRes >= 1 && articles >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is active but only ' + articles + ' published KB articles exist (target: 100+). Now Assist VA KB deflection coverage will be limited.'
        };
    } else if (activeAutoRes === 0 && articles >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Sufficient KB content exists (' + articles + ' published articles) but VA auto-resolution is not active. Now Assist VA cannot surface KB articles for deflection without an active auto-resolution configuration.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA auto-resolution is ' + (activeAutoRes >= 1 ? 'active' : 'not active') + ' with only ' + articles + ' published KB articles. Now Assist VA cannot provide meaningful KB-based self-service deflection without both an active auto-resolution configuration and sufficient KB content.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"VA knowledge integration enables Now Assist to surface relevant KB articles within conversations. Without KB integration, Now Assist cannot provide article-based self-service answers.","remediation_guidance":"Configure and activate VA auto-resolution via sys_cs_auto_resolution_configuration. Ensure at least 100 published KB articles exist for deflection coverage. Now Assist VA surfaces KB articles as AI-recommended answers in conversations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Catalog Integration","order":"110","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()","ai_justification":"VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.","remediation_guidance":"Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Security and Authentication","order":"120","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_channel');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active VA channels found',
            finding: 'No active VA channels found. Authentication configuration cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaSecured = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_channel');
    gaSecured.addQuery('active', true);
    gaSecured.addQuery('requires_login', true);
    gaSecured.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaSecured.query();
    var secured = gaSecured.next() ? parseInt(gaSecured.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((secured / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active VA channels require authentication (' + secured + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of VA channels require authentication. Now Assist VA respects data access controls and will not surface unauthorized data in AI responses.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - secured) + ' VA channel(s) allow unauthenticated access (' + pct + '% secured, target: 80%+). Now Assist VA must authenticate users to enforce data access controls in AI responses.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA channels require authentication. Most VA channels allow unauthenticated access — Now Assist VA AI responses may surface data without proper access control enforcement.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"VA security configuration ensures Now Assist only responds to authenticated users and respects data access controls within conversations.","remediation_guidance":"Configure authentication requirements for all VA channels. Test security controls end-to-end. Target: 80%+ of active channels requiring login. Now Assist VA security must match your organization's data protection requirements.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Live Agent Escalation Configuration","order":"130","check_script":"(function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("awa_queue")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"awa_queue table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Advanced Work Assignment is installed and active."};}var ga=new GlideAggregate("awa_queue");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active agent escalation queues";if(count>=1){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active escalation queue(s) configured. Now Assist VA can hand off to human agents when AI cannot resolve the conversation."};}else{return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active agent escalation queues configured in AWA. Now Assist VA users are stranded when AI cannot resolve their request -- live agent escalation paths are required for a complete self-service experience.";};};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})()","ai_justification":"Live agent escalation configuration ensures Now Assist VA can hand off to human agents when AI cannot resolve. Without escalation paths, users are stranded in failed VA conversations.","remediation_guidance":"Configure agent escalation queues and routing via sys_cs_queue. Test escalation paths from each VA channel. Now Assist VA must have human escalation paths for conversations AI cannot resolve.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Topic Testing and Simulation","order":"140","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addQuery('published', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No published VA topics found',
            finding: 'No published VA topics found. Topic testing cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    // Topics updated in last 90 days — proxy for active maintenance
    var gaRecent = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaRecent.addQuery('active', true);
    gaRecent.addQuery('published', true);
    gaRecent.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaRecent.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRecent.query();
    var recentlyUpdated = gaRecent.next() ? parseInt(gaRecent.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' published topics | ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated in last 90 days';

    if (total >= 20 && recentlyUpdated >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' published topics with ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated in the last 90 days, indicating active topic maintenance. Note: actual test simulation results must be manually verified in the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' published topics but only ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated recently. Topics may not be actively maintained — review and test via VA Test Simulation before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' published topics (target: 20+). Ensure all published topics are tested via VA Test Simulation before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Tested VA topics produce reliable Now Assist experiences. Untested topics create broken self-service that damages AI adoption.","remediation_guidance":"Test all published VA topics via the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement. Document and fix any broken flows. Target: 20+ published topics with evidence of recent maintenance (updated within 90 days).","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"VIRTUAL_AGENT","check_name":"VA Customization Risk","order":"150","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom active VA topics';

    if (count <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low VA customization risk (' + count + ' custom topics). Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count <= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom active VA topics. Moderate customization — test Now Assist VA with all custom topics enabled in sub-production before go-live.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High VA customization risk: ' + count + ' custom active topics. Extensive customization may interfere with Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching accuracy.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Custom topic blocks and client scripts can break Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom VA topics and test with Now Assist VA enabled in sub-production. Document any conflicts between custom topic logic and Now Assist generative AI responses.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:35</sys_created_on><sys_id>b160cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_VIRTUAL_AGENT</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_b160cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
